---
format:
  html:
    code-tools: true
  typst:
    papersize: a4
    margin:
      x: 1.5cm
      y: 2.0cm
    section-numbering: 1.1.a
    mainfont: "Calibri"
    fontsize: 11pt
---

```{=typst}
#let title-page(title:[], team_number:[], authors:[], tutor: [], project: [], body) = {

  // 1. COVER PAGE
  set page(footer: none)
  
  align(horizon + center)[
    #text(size: 40pt, "ENSAI")
    #line(start: (0cm, 0cm), end: (17cm, 0%), stroke: (thickness: 2pt))
    #text(size: 24pt, title)\
    #line(start: (0cm, 0cm), end: (17cm, 0%), stroke: (thickness: 2pt))
    #v(1em)
    Equipe #text(team_number)
    #v(2em)
  ]

  align(left)[
    Étudiants :
    #v(0.1em)
    #authors.map(a => [#a]).join("\n")
  ]

  align(right)[
    Encadrant :
    #v(0.1em)
    #text(tutor)
  ]
  
  align(bottom + center)[
    #text(project)
  ]
  
  // 2. TABLE OF CONTENTS
  pagebreak()
  set page(fill: none, margin: auto)
  align(horizon, outline(indent: auto)) //toc
  
  
  // 3. BODY
  pagebreak()
  counter(page).update(1)
  
  set page(
    footer: context {
      set align(center)
      counter(page).display()
    }
  )

  body
}

#show: body => title-page(
  title: [Créer un rapport de projet\ avec Quarto et Typst],
  team_number: [8],
  authors: ([Laurent Costa], [Ludovic Deneuville], [Christophe Lesieur], [Brandon Saintilan]),
  tutor: [Michel],
  project: [Projet Statistique de 1ère année - Année 2025-2026],
  body
)
```

## Introduction

Ne pas utiliser tinytex mais typst : <https://quarto.org/docs/output-formats/typst.html>

<https://typst.app/>

<https://github.com/InseeFrLab/jms2025-typst/blob/main/_extensions/jms2025/typst-template.typ>


{{< pagebreak >}}

## Première partie

Bonjour

### Première sous-partie

::: {.callout-tip}
Une petite astuce
:::

#### première sous-sous-partie

```{.sql}
SELECT *
  FROM user
 WHERE 1 = 1
```

### Deuxième sous-partie

- Paper-based exam
- Duration: 1h30
- 1 handwritten A4 sheet (front and back) allowed
- No calculator

### Troisème sous-partie

| Modifier                | Same Class | Same Package | Subclasses  |  Everywhere   |
|-------------------------|------------|--------------|-------------|---------------|
| public                  | ✅         | ✅          | ✅          | ✅           |
| protected               | ✅         | ✅          | ✅          | ❌           |
| *default* (no modifier) | ✅         | ✅          | ❌          | ❌           |
| private                 | ✅         | ❌          | ❌          | ❌           |

{{< pagebreak >}}


## Deuxième partie

> citation


## Bibliographie {.unnumbered}

Use bib file
